title: ANC - changes are present after putting the app in the background
scenario: ANC settings persist after backgrounding and foregrounding the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
Set ANC to a specific mode (e.g., Active Noise Canceling High).
Press the Home button or recent apps button to put the Poly Studio Mobile app in the background.
Wait a few seconds, then reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app by tapping its icon or selecting it from recent apps.
Navigate back to Audio Settings → ANC.
expected: The ANC setting should remain unchanged (e.g., still showing Active Noise Canceling High) after bringing the app back to the foreground.
